commands: bash -lc '! rg -n "universal proof|universal conclusion|not proof that|source claim is universal|does not turn the source claim" docs/coherence-substrate/form-language.md form/form-stdlib/channel.fk docs/system_audit/commit_evidence_2026-06-02_phonemic_channel_flow.json'

local_validation.summary: The channel lens language now names the affirmative evidence contract: attributed success, value, attribution, expansion, circulation, vitality, and chosen next contact are enough. The residual universality framing was removed from the touched channel docs, Form comment, and prior channel-flow evidence. The Form channel proof still returns 900 across sibling kernels.

phase_gate.reason: Local correction proof is complete; CI remains pending until the PR branch is pushed.
